displayTitle: Adventures: Luke Skywalker And The Treasure Of The Dragonsnake
synopsis: The movie The Empire Strikes Back shows us only a small portion of Luke Skywalker's Jedi training under the tutelage of Master Yoda. In this story, witness a never-before-seen part of that training as Luke is given the task of finding -- and retrieving -- an object guarded by the deadliest creatures on the swamp world of Dagobah: the monstrous dragonsnakes! This is the most harrowing, dangerous, and muddiest mission that Luke has ever faced!
title: Star Wars Adventures: Luke Skywalker And The Treasure Of The Dragonsnake
